introSection: F² Fright Flight is a Vekoma inverted roller coaster currently located at Nasu Highland Park in Nasu, Nasu, Tochigi, Japan. The ride was sold by Meisho Amusement Machines, who sold Vekoma coasters in Japan at the time.

fullText:
F² Fright Flight is a Vekoma inverted roller coaster currently located at Nasu Highland Park in Nasu, Nasu, Tochigi, Japan. The ride was sold by Meisho Amusement Machines, who sold Vekoma coasters in Japan at the time.



Purple track and blue supports.






 * F² Fright Flight on the parks website (Japanese)
